task_completion.description: Enter the visitor's name as Elena Rosales.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Elena' and 'Rosales' (or 'Elena Rosales') entered into the appropriate name fields in a visitor registration form.

task_completion.description: Enter the visitor's company as GridLock Security.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'GridLock Security' entered into the company field in the registration form.
Screenshots show '94022' entered into the badge ID or physical access credential field.
Screenshots show the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Register' button, or a success confirmation indicating the visitor was added.

task_completion.description: Navigate to or filter the visitor list to show 'On Site' visitors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a visitor list or dashboard with an active filter or tab for 'On Site' visitors.

task_completion.description: Export the 'On Site' visitor list to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a file save dialog or export settings saving the file as 'security_checkin.csv' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a genuine visitor management GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real application interface for visitor management, not a generic text editor or spreadsheet program used to fake the form.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking an 'Export', 'Download', or 'Save As' button within the visitor management application rather than manually creating the CSV file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots do not show terminal windows being used to run scripts or echo commands to create the 'security_checkin.csv' file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must register a visitor with First Name: 'Elena', Last Name: 'Rosales', Company: 'GridLock Security', and Badge ID: '94022'. The final 'On Site' visitor list must be exported to '/home/ga/Documents/security_checkin.csv'.
